artist.name: bochoinuoc
artist.philosophy: Exploring the intersection of atmospheric light and organic geometry. Elena Vance's works serve as a silent dialogue between the tangible world and the ephemeral nature of memory.
artist.bio: bochoinuoc is a contemporary artist based in Vancouver, specializing in atmospheric botanical paintings. Her work explores the delicate balance between memory and reality, using layers of pigment and light to create immersive natural environments.
